title: All predicted superheavy Madelung anomalies Z=119-172 lie in boundary zone |Δd|≤1 (out-of-sample validation)
_fixture_purpose: Out-of-sample validation of [222] boundary-zone claim on 54 predicted superheavy element configurations (Z=119-172, first-listed Wikipedia/Pyykko/Fricke/Nefedov predictions). Every predicted anomaly (deviation from Madelung aufbau) has its max-|Δd| shift ≤ 1. 51 of 54 elements are anomalous; 3 (Z=119, 120, 164) match Madelung exactly. Distribution: see below. Combined with the 20 light-atom anomalies in mab_pass_20_anomalies.json, the cert now covers 74 data points with 100% in-zone rate.
source_attribution: Will Dale + Claude 2026-04-13. Predicted configurations: Wikipedia Extended periodic table (accessed 2026-04-13), citing Fricke et al. 1971, Nefedov et al. 2006, Pyykko 2011 (Dirac-Fock relativistic calculations up to Z=172). NIST Atomic Spectra Database for validation baselines.

structural_claim.necessity: all 51 predicted anomalies Z=119-172 in zone
structural_claim.sufficiency: zone is not sufficient; many predicted ground states match Madelung (Z=119, 120, 164)
structural_claim.falsifiability: any experimental or theoretical superheavy anomaly with |Δd|≥2 breaks the claim

null_test.procedure: Uniform random 2-subshell picks from first 30 Madelung positions (covers up to 11s at Z≈170). Compute fraction with |Δd|≤1; compare to observed rate among anomalies.
null_test.note: binomial tail for 51 successes out of 51 trials under baseline p≈0.28

witnesses.description: All 51 predicted superheavy anomalies (Z=119-172) satisfy |Δd| ≤ 1; zero violations.
witnesses.verification: validator regenerates Madelung config for each Z, parses predicted config, extracts deficit and excess subshells, checks max |Δd| over all deficit-excess pairings

witnesses.description: Binomial p < 10^-25 (54 out of 54 in zone under baseline ~28%).
witnesses.verification: binomial tail with p=baseline, n=54, k=54

witnesses.description: Zone is permissive; Z=119, 120, 164 lie in zone but match Madelung exactly (no anomaly).
witnesses.verification: 3 of 54 Z checked have zero electron shift from Madelung prediction
